operation_mapping.navigate_page: Map Hermes browser tools to search, product, and supplier page navigation
operation_mapping.read_visible_content: Capture only visible page evidence through Hermes reading tools
operation_mapping.open_supplier_or_product_link: Follow shortlisted supplier and product links inside the active Hermes session
operation_mapping.write_candidate_set: Emit a bounded candidate-set JSON artifact before deeper supplier review
operation_mapping.write_evidence_notes: Emit an evidence-notes JSON artifact before final Markdown synthesis
operation_mapping.write_markdown_report: Emit a supplier-first Markdown report artifact
operation_mapping.normalize_final_output: Trim banners, duplicated completions, and session trailers before saving the canonical Markdown report artifact

constraints: Current direct-site validation requires an operator-provided authenticated Chrome session; automated login is not validated.
notes: Use this manifest together with adapters/hermes/PROMPT.md.
A local-only Hermes report generation run was exercised on April 16, 2026, including canonical-output normalization from a noisy raw transcript.
A browser-side live run on April 16, 2026 launched headless Chromium and entered mirror fallback navigation, but stalled before emitting a final report artifact.

Follow-up single-page probes on April 16, 2026 showed that Hermes can emit final Markdown artifacts for a blocked direct detail page and a readable mirror page, but the full supplier-discovery compatibility test is still incomplete.

An operator-assisted direct-site validation on April 16, 2026 reused a logged-in Chrome session, confirmed a readable direct product detail page, and emitted a partial direct-site supplier-discovery report with one credible supplier.

Hermes should be treated as validated_partial in the current environment; validated_direct is not yet justified because the direct workflow still depends on operator-prepared login state and did not produce a full 3-supplier shortlist.
The recommended Hermes validation path is now phased: search harvest, evidence pass, and report synthesis, with structured intermediate artifacts persisted under verification/.
